login.title: Sign in to your account
login.provider_hint: If the provider buttons are disabled, configure `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`, `MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`, and `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`.

signup.title: Create account
signup.phone_help: The number must start with the selected country dialing code.

admin.title: Administrator access
admin.subtitle: Monitor key metrics and authenticate with administrative credentials.

messages.select_admin_entity: Select the entity to sign in as administrator.
messages.account_status: Account is in '{status}' state. Contact the administrator.
messages.admin_only_access: Administrative access is available only for administrator users.
messages.user_without_active_entity: User has no active linked entity.
messages.forbidden_other_entity: You are not allowed to sign in with a different entity than the one linked to your user.
messages.no_permission_selected_entity: You do not have permission to sign in to the selected entity.
messages.account_exists_use_login: An account with this email already exists. Use sign in.
messages.signup_failed: Could not create the account. Try again.
messages.provider_missing_email: The provider did not return an email.
messages.external_login_failed: Could not complete external sign in.
messages.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.
